title: The Problem Solvers | Anton Osika at Lovable
summary: Lovable is a platform that lets anyone build software through conversation without requiring an engineering team. Within two months of launch, millions of users adopted the platform. The product is built with Claude and represents Anton Osika's belief that trust and care are key competitive advantages in AI.
